heading: selecting, connecting, dancing
intro: i occasionally curate music and weave it together -- from techno to hip hop and jazz -- mostly for myself to enjoy, and sometimes at friends' parties. here are two of my 2 favorite recorded sessions. it continues playing in the background as you explore the rest of the page.

artists.title: sonia calico
artists.desc: taiwanese producer. experimental club, 3rd culture, relentless energy.

artists.title: acid pauli
artists.desc: austrian producer. hyper creative, deeply textured, life affirming.

artists.title: nils frahm
artists.desc: german composer. intimate textures, nerdy pianist, ambient soundscapes.

movies.title: sense8
movies.desc: eight strangers across the world share consciousness and learn wholesomeness.

movies.title: everything everywhere all at once
movies.desc: multiverse absurdism in which love wins.

movies.title: altered carbon
movies.desc: consciousness uploads turbocharge inequality and your philosophy.

games.title: hanabi
games.desc: cooperative card game where you can see everyone's hand but your own. pure coordination problem.

games.title: secret hitler
games.desc: watching your friends lie to your face is a great way to build trust.
